assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 7 of claude-md-result.md: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — matches the expected Role ('Rust backend service'), Serena Instance ('serena_backend'), and Path ('/home/user/trustify-backend') exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: Line 8 of claude-md-result.md: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — a new trustify-ui row is present with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 12-16 of claude-md-result.md show all five Jira fields preserved exactly: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has two clear sections: '## Preserved (no modifications)' listing trustify-backend row, all 5 Jira fields, and Code Intelligence content as preserved; and '## Added' listing the trustify-ui row and serena_ui limitation entry as added.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 9: 'serena_backend — Already configured in Repository Registry' with Status: 'Already configured — no action needed'. Line 13: 'serena_ui — Newly discovered, not in Repository Registry' with Status: 'Newly discovered'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-29 preserve the naming convention text ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.'), the serena_backend find_symbol example, and line 33 preserves the serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use'). The only addition is line 34: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'. changes-log.md also confirms: 'Introductory text and naming convention documentation preserved', 'serena_backend usage example preserved', and 'serena_backend limitation entry preserved'.
